info.title: bicep-local-docgen
info.description: Bicep Local Deploy documentation is a tool for generating documentation from Bicep C# models.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generate documentation files from Bicep models having the [ResourceType] attribute and additional custom attributes from Bicep.LocalDeploy project.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate documentation files from Bicep models.

arguments.name: directoryOrFile
arguments.description: One or more paths to directories containing files to process or specific files to process. If omitted, uses current directory.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check if models have the required documentation attributes.

arguments.name: directoryOrFile
arguments.description: One or more paths to directories containing files to check or specific files to check. If omitted, uses current directory.
